name: revit_create_wall_schedule_on_sheet
description: Creates a wall view schedule with fields and filters, then places it on a new sheet.

title_block_type_id.description: Optional title block FamilySymbol id; sample uses first available

sheet_name.description: Name for the new sheet hosting the schedule

notes: Wraps ScheduleCreationUtility.CreateAndAddSchedules; defaults to OST_Walls sample logic.
